titleStmt.title: SII 37.287: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 287. (A.R. No. B 393 of 1940-41.) Kōsinēpalle, Jammalamaḍugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the Āñjanēya temple.
This is dated Śaka 1476, Ānanda, Śrāvaṇa, śu. 2, Tuesday, corresponding to 1554 A.D., July 31.

It registers a gift of their tyāga-varttana income due from the Mahājanas of the village Kosinēpalle by Vipravinodins to god Kōna Tiruvēṅgaḷanātha for the annual cherapu festival of the deity. The village was a Sarvamānya-agrahāra and was surnamed Harihararāyapuram and was included in Chennūru-sīma.
[Published in Inscriptions of Andhra Pradesh; Cuddapah District, Part II, No. 238.]

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrastu . niraṁ
tarāyōstu .
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1476 A
gunēṁṭi Ānaṁda saṁvatsara śrāvaṇa śu 2 ma śrīmadrājādhirājarājaparamēśvara
śrīvīrapratāpa śrī sadāsivadēvamahārājhalu vidyānagaramaṁdu vajra siṁhāsanārū
ḍhuṁḍai pṛthvisāmrājyaṁ sēyaṁgānu cernūri sīmaku cellē kosanepalleku prati
nāmamaina harihararāyapura sarvvamānya Agrahāraṁ purāṇa puruṣōttamu
ḍaina kōna tiruveṁgaḷanādhaniki vipra vinōdulu kāsyapagōtraṁ Āpastaṁbhasūtraṁ
yejuśśākhādhyāyulaina pedakēśavayyaṁgāri pautṛlaina kēśavayyagāri
putṛlu cannaya lakṣmaya sidayaṁgārunnu tadgōtraṁ tatsūtraṁ tatśākhādhyāyulai
na praḷayakāla gōviṁddagiri pautṛlaina rudraya putṛlaina gōviṁdaya tītāra
yyaṁgāruṁnnu vasiṣṭagōtraṁ Āpastaṁbhasūtraṁ yajuśśākhādhyāyulaina gōviṁdaya
gāri pautṛlaina rācaya putṛṁḍainagōviṁdayānu Āvallabhaya pautṛlaina vīraya pu
tṛḍu vallabhayānu Āmallayya pautṛlainaliṁgaya putṛlu tammayānu dharmayānu Ā liṁ
gaya pautṛṁḍaina vīraya putṛṁḍaina liṁgaya pautṛṁḍaina liṁgaya pu
tṛlu vīrayānu mallayānu kosanepalle mahājanālu vipravinōdulakiccē tyā
gavartanalu kōna tiruveṁgaḷanādhani cerappa tirunāḷaku sarvamānyaṁgānu mā
kulasvāmulaina vipravinōdulakallā puṇyaṁgānu samarpiṁciIccina dharmaśāsanaṁ .
yī dharmānaku yavvaru tappinānu tamatallidaṁḍṟlanuṁnnu gōbrāhmalanuṁnnu vāraṇā
silō vadhiṁcina pāpānaṁbōvuvāru kukka punukalō kāki māṁsamunu suratō
kalapuka tinna pāpānaṁ bōvuvāru . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu
pālanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
Digital edition of SII 37.287 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
